title: polygala refracta var. steudeliana
intro: Polygala refracta var. steudeliana, also known as the mountain krachy, is a plant species belonging to the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Polygala refracta var. steudeliana include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and antioxidant effects. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies in various parts of the world.
